summary: Backend 3x Cloudz earn rate WORKING. Frontend AppHeader only visible on Home tab - NOT visible on Shop, Orders, Account tabs despite code showing <AppHeader /> is present in all 4 tab files. Critical UI bug found.

critical.issue: AppHeader NOT visible on Shop, Orders, Account tabs despite <AppHeader /> being in JSX. Only visible on Home tab.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix AppHeader visibility on Shop, Orders, Account tabs - currently only shows on Home tab
Investigate why AppHeader renders on Home but not other tabs despite identical code pattern <AppHeader /> at top of container View
critical_code_review_comments: Backend earn rate CORRECT: server.py line 613 shows `points_earned = int(order_data.total) * 3`
AppHeader component exists with correct data-testid attributes (app-header, header-icon-btn, header-cloudz-badge, header-cart-btn)
All 4 tab files (home.tsx, shop.tsx, orders.tsx, account.tsx) import and use <AppHeader /> at top of container
BUG: AppHeader visually renders ONLY on Home tab - likely CSS/rendering issue, not code logic issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: AppHeader is visually rendering on Home tab only. Shop/Orders/Account tabs show their titles (Shop, My Orders, Account) at top with NO header above them. The DOM contains '30000' text on all pages but it's not visually rendered as the header badge on non-Home tabs. This appears to be a React Native Web rendering issue, not a code logic issue.

account_tab.note: 30,000 shows in Cloudz Points card body, not header
